full_text:
Duan Xun 段訓
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Duan Xun (段訓). Sent to reward Liu Yu and Gongsun Zan, instead was forced to execute Liu Yu. Duan Xun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
